videos.title: This Colorado Mountain Is Hollow
videos.description: In this episode of Recon America, I'm exploring the Bachelor Loop above Creede, Colorado — the last great silver boomtown in the state. This 17-mile trail winds through what's left of a mining district that produced a billion dollars' worth of silver at today's prices: the massive Commodore Mine with its 200 miles of tunnels, abandoned townsites where hundreds of people lived at 10,000 feet, and a few surprises along the way — including a moose, a locked gate, and a fire station you have to see

I took the Ford Ranger Raptor into the Canadian Rockies during the worst weather I have ever experienced. Between the relentless torrential rain and the infamous 'Alberta Grease' mud, the trails at McLean Creek were completely flooded.

The real value of semantic models isn’t DAX, its understanding of the business
videos.description: Every Power BI semantic model contains critical business knowledge, calculations, and assumptions that are often locked inside the head of the person who built it. This walkthrough follows a real-world scenario where a report owner needs to update an executive dashboard without access to the original model author.

videos.title: What is Azure Arc? Monitor, Manage & Secure SQL Server Anywhere
videos.description:
Azure Arc gives you a single control plane for managing SQL Server instances across on-premises, Azure, AWS, and other environments—without migrating them.

In this video, you'll learn how Azure Arc helps DBAs monitor performance, improve security, automate management tasks, and simplify SQL Server migrations from one central location. 

If your SQL Servers are scattered across multiple clouds and data centers, Azure Arc can bring them together into a unified management experience. Patrick LeBla

videos.title: I retired from Microsoft!
The AI skill nobody talks about (and it isn't prompting) #AI #prompting #productivity #tech
videos.description:
Two people sit down with the exact same chatbot on the exact same Tuesday. The first types a quick request for a slide deck, gets back something about eighty percent right, and spends the rest of the morning fixing it.

The second spends eleven minutes writing a real specification first, hands it off, and treats the model like an autonomous agent instead of a chat window. Then they go make coffee. They come back to a finished deck that hits every bar they set, and they do it five more times befo

videos.title: The one question that tells you if your role is safe #AI #careers #AIjobs #jobs #tech
videos.description:
It is an uncomfortable question, and it is the fastest way to see your own risk clearly. If the honest answer is no, then a lot of what you do is coordination, and coordination is the first thing that gets cut when an organization gets leaner, because agents and better internal tooling absorb it first.

The move is not to panic. It is to migrate toward work that creates direct value. Look for ways to ring the cash register. Build things customers actually touch. Get closer to revenue and to the

videos.title: How the 4 New Models Released This Week Will Change How You Work
videos.description:
Four major releases—GPT Live, Grok 4.5, Cognition SWE 1.7, and GPT‑5.6 Sol—signal an accelerated model cadence and growing specialization across AI. GPT Live introduces full‑duplex voice with background model orchestration for real‑time translation, tutoring, and conversational assistants. Grok 4.5 and Cognition SWE 1.7 prioritize cost‑efficient, high‑speed agentic coding and workflow automation while GPT‑5.6 Sol acts as a fast, practical workhorse contrasted with Fable's deeper reasoning.

The

videos.title: How AI Changes if Open Source Gets Banned
videos.description: Potential Chinese limits on overseas distribution of open-weight models could recast frontier AI as a national security asset and reshape global model access. Consequences for token efficiency and cost structures point toward heavier reliance on post-training tuning, lightweight open models, and proprietary alternatives. Coverage includes GPT 5.6 and Fable 5 comparisons, SpaceXAI's Grok 4.5, Meta's Muse Image, Microsoft's Frontier Tuning, and the rise of model routers to balance capability, cost
